# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: database_dsn
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Parses the Go MySQL DSN form `user:password@protocol(addr)/db` and
# redacts userinfo; preserves protocol, address, database and params.
# Example: user:password@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname →
# ****:****@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname.

user:password@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname	****:****@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname

# === generated (do not edit; regenerated by make corpus-regen) ===
